name: Apple iPhone 17 (256GB, Lavender)
desc: The next-generation iPhone featuring a massive leap in processing power, advanced AI integrations via iOS, and a refined aerospace-grade aluminum chassis. Perfect for heavy daily use, photography, and mobile gaming.
review: I'm keeping this as a priority. My current phone is completely messed up, and the new A19 chip combined with the lavender finish makes this the perfect daily driver upgrade.

specs.val: 6.3-inch Super Retina XDR OLED (2556 x 1179 pixels, 60Hz)
4K Dolby Vision HDR up to 60 fps
Aerospace-grade Aluminum with matte glass back
USB-C, MagSafe wireless charging up to 25W
IP68 dust and water resistance (6 meters for 30 mins)

name: Logitech G PRO X Superlight 2
desc: The ultimate esports gaming mouse. Zero additive PTFE feet ensure a smooth glide, while the new LIGHTFORCE hybrid switches provide incredible speed and reliability without compromising on the crisp, tactile click.

specs.val: Up to 95 hours constant motion (1000Hz polling)

name: Logitech G29 Racing Wheel
desc: Engineered for the perfect driving experience with dual-motor force feedback, stainless steel paddle shifters, and a hand-stitched leather steering wheel. Includes an adjustable floor pedal unit.

specs.val: Hand-stitched Leather cover over Aluminum spokes
Cold rolled steel frames, brushed stainless steel faces

name: Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses
desc: Iconic Ray-Ban Wayfarer style fused with Meta's cutting-edge AI. Capture ultra-wide 12MP photos and 1080p video, listen to music via open-ear speakers, and interact with Meta AI directly from your face.

specs.val: Custom-built open-ear speakers with enhanced bass
5-mic array for immersive spatial audio capture
Up to 4 hours active use (case provides 8 additional charges)

name: MacBook Air 15-inch (M5)
desc: Apple's incredibly thin and light 15-inch laptop, supercharged by the new M5 chip. Features a fanless design for silent operation, a stunning Liquid Retina display, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and up to 18 hours of battery life.

specs.val: 16-core Neural Engine (Neural Accelerator per GPU core)
15.3-inch Liquid Retina display (2880x1864 at 224 ppi, 500 nits)
512GB PCIe SSD (2x faster R/W than M4 gen)
Up to 18 hours video playback (66.5Wh battery)
12MP Center Stage camera with Desk View
Six-speaker sound system with Force Cancelling woofers, Spatial Audio
Two Thunderbolt 4 / USB 4, MagSafe 3, 3.5mm headphone jack

name: Microsoft Surface Pro 11th Gen
desc: The most flexible Copilot+ PC ever built. Combines the power of a laptop with the portability of a tablet, featuring a stunning OLED display and all-day battery life powered by the Snapdragon X Elite.

specs.val: Snapdragon X Elite X1E-80-100 (Copilot+ PC, NPU 45 TOPS)
13-inch PixelSense Flow OLED touchscreen (2880 x 1920, 267 PPI)
1080p IR front camera, 10MP Ultra HD rear camera
Up to 14 hours local video playback
2x USB-C (USB4 / Thunderbolt 4), Surface Connect, nano SIM slot

Hybrid D-pad for accurate, sweeping inputs
Dedicated Share button for screenshots/video capture
2x AA batteries, up to 40 hours battery life
Custom button mapping via Xbox Accessories app
Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, Windows PC, Android, iOS

Trigger macros, switch OBS scenes, control audio, launch apps

specs.val: Titanium Armor frame, Corning Gorilla Armor 2, IP68 (6m/30min)

desc: The compact flagship. Delivering all of Samsung's core Galaxy AI features and premium build quality in a much smaller, pocket-friendly form factor.

specs.val: Armor Aluminum frame, Gorilla Glass Victus 3
